name: Boat trip around the southern coves and caves (from Cala Galdana)
description: A short boat trip from Cala Galdana reveals the unspoilt south-western coves from the water —Mitjana, Trebalúger, Macarella— and caves you cannot see any other way, with a stop for a swim in turquoise water. Ideal for little ones: no walking and time aboard.

highlights: see Cala Mitjana, Trebalúger and Macarella from the sea, along with hidden caves
one or two swimming stops in crystal-clear water (snorkelling masks usually provided)
an easy outing of about 2 h with a toilet and café on board, suitable for all ages
